goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'east' and should be in the type of 'swimmingpool'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be 'in the same area as the attraction' and should serve 'british' food.
The restaurant should be in the 'expensive' price range.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the east and should be in the type of swimmingpool
Make sure you get phone number
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the same area as the attraction and should serve british food
The restaurant should be in the expensive price range
Make sure you get phone number and address
